SQLLite.SQL: SELECT NVL(wp.event_seq, -1) AS "CaseEventSeq", NVL(wp.ae_event_seq, -1) AS "AeEventSeq", NVL(wp.co_event_seq, -1) AS "CoEventSeq", NVL(wp.warrant_returns_id, -1) AS "WarrantReturnId" FROM wp_output wp WHERE wp.output_id = ${param.outputId}

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper cpSuper ccbcMan ccbcUser ccbcSGB2
